Accueil/Aventure/Run Gun Robots

Run Gun Robots

Aventure4.741k parties jouées

Run Gun Robots is a run and gun game, where you have to jump from building to building destroying aggressive robots and avoiding deadly traps. Earn money buy defeating enemies and buy new powerups to to better address this new threat. Controls: Mobile: Touch the button on the screen to Jump, Shoot or pass trough a platform. Keyboard: W or Up to jump, X or Spacebar to shoot, S or Down to pass trough a platform Game pad: A or LT to Jump, B or RT to shoot, D-pad Down to pass trough a platform -4 different enemies -10 levels with increasing difficulty - Engaging music

#adventure
